title: The Shattered Hourglass
description: A sacred hourglass blessed by Chronos himself has been stolen from a roadside shrine near Crossroads. The Priest of Chronos believes bandits took it, not knowing its significance. The artifact must be recovered before its temporal energies dissipate - or worse, fall into the wrong hands. He suspects the thieves fled to the Bandit Hideout to the east.

objectives.description: Investigate the desecrated shrine near Crossroads
Track the bandits to their hideout
Defeat the bandit leader who ordered the theft
Return the hourglass to Priest of Chronos
